label.style: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; color: #aaa;

svg.text: 1. Enter your proxy backend URL (or use default)
2. Enter the URL you want to browse
Note: This proxy uses Scramjet to bypass internet censorship.

iframe.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: #fff;
iframe.sandbox: allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-popups allow-top-navigation allow-downloads
